text:
The Kotoritana Republic (, Kotoritana Kyōwakoku) is a location that is roughly as large as Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 134 

Overview

The size of the Kotoritana Republic is speculated to be as large as Greed Island. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

The Phantom Troupe member Shalnark uses the Kotoritana Republic as a tantamount size of Greed Island. 

Trivia

The Kotoritana Republic is not mentioned in either anime adaptation, being manga-only.
For reference it is noted in the manga that the Kotoritana Republic (and by analogy Greed Island) is about the size of real-life Hokkaido island of Japan (approximately 83,450 km²/32,220 sq. mi.). 
The Viz translation erroneously presents the size of Hokkaido as being "~83,000 sq. mi. -ed", quantifying the size of the island in miles (which would result in a different value) rather than kilometers.

References
